series_metadata.series_description: Contains annual hospital disclosure non-government inpatient discharges most frequently treated diagnostically related groups (DRG's), hospital registration and planning report for statistical and financial information.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain disk for 3 years after the hard copy is destroyed ; Paper: Retain 2 years, then destroy if there is no legal action pending, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
